case_title: ATLANTIC MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. KATHRYN ANN MORISAWA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORISAWA, KATHRYN ANN AKA KATHRYN ANN FLESCHNER $9,238.54 PRINCIPAL, $3,333.47 INTEREST, $228.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,800.31, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION OF BRADLEY A. WEISE RE: REQUEST TO CONTINUE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR APRIL 26, 2006 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-22-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-06-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF BRADLEY A. WEISE RE REQUEST TO VACATE OSC HEARING SET FOR FEBRUARY22, 2006 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AGAINST DEFENDANT AND TO CONTINUE CASE MANAGMENT CONFERENCE HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY
